component.name: CitrixLASOfflineRestrictedShortener
component.description: Offline tool for encoding Citrix LAS licensing data (LSID + RSA public key) into human-typeable chunked keys using Crockford Base32 encoding. Includes a 3-step workflow: encode on the License Server, decode on a machine with portal access, and import the activation response. Designed for air-gapped environments where file transfer is not possible.

text.content: This software / sample code is provided to you AS IS with no representations, warranties or conditions of any kind. You may use, modify and distribute it at your own risk. CITRIX DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES WHATSOEVER, EXPRESS, IMPLIED, WRITTEN, ORAL OR STATUTORY, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE AND NONINFRINGEMENT.

components.name: Python
components.description: Python programming language runtime. All application modules are from the Python standard library — no third-party packages are used at runtime.

components.name: base64
components.description: Base64, Base32, Base85 encoding/decoding. Used to decode PEM key body and encode final output.

components.name: hashlib
components.description: Secure hash functions. Used to compute SHA-256 verification hashes for data integrity confirmation between encode and decode sides.

components.name: json
components.description: JSON encoder and decoder. Used to parse input files and extract LSID and pubkey fields.

components.name: struct
components.description: Pack and unpack binary data with fixed layouts. Used to encode byte lengths as fixed-size binary headers.

components.name: os
components.description: Operating system interface. Used for file path operations, file size checks, permission management, and path normalization.

components.name: sys
components.description: System-specific parameters and functions. Used for command-line argument handling, EULA switch detection, and exit codes.

components.name: zipfile
components.description: Read and write ZIP archive files. Used to open .zip archives and read JSON files inside them without extracting to disk. Includes zip bomb size checking.

components.name: datetime
components.description: Date and time handling. Used to generate timestamps for output filenames, log entries, and export file preservation.

components.name: logging
components.description: Logging framework. Used to record activities to both a log file and the GUI log viewer tab.

components.name: tkinter
components.description: Standard GUI toolkit for Python. Used to build the graphical interface with 7 tabs including EULA acceptance dialog, encode, decode, activation import, log viewer, release notes, and about.

components.name: shutil
components.description: High-level file operations. Used to copy export files from the Citrix cache directory to the user's Desktop.

components.name: subprocess
components.description: Subprocess management. Used to execute the Citrix ctxLasOfflineActivationTool.exe for export generation and activation import. Uses list-form execution (no shell) with timeouts.

components.name: stat
components.description: File permission constants. Used to set restrictive file permissions (owner-only) on output files.

components.name: PyInstaller
components.description: Bundles Python application and interpreter into a standalone Windows executable. Used only at build time — not included in the runtime application.

components.name: altgraph
components.description: Graph data structure library. PyInstaller build-time dependency.

components.name: packaging
components.description: Version parsing and specifiers. PyInstaller build-time dependency.

components.name: pefile
components.description: Windows PE file parser. PyInstaller build-time dependency.

components.name: pyinstaller-hooks-contrib
components.description: Community-maintained hooks for PyInstaller. Build-time dependency.

components.name: pywin32-ctypes
components.description: Windows API bindings via ctypes. PyInstaller build-time dependency.

components.name: setuptools
components.description: Python package management. PyInstaller build-time dependency.

components.name: ctxLasOfflineActivationTool
components.description: Citrix LAS Offline Activation Tool. External executable invoked via subprocess for two operations: (1) generating the darksiteRequest.zip export file, and (2) importing the activation.blob.zip response file. Not bundled — must be installed separately as part of the Citrix Licensing Server.

properties.name: eula-required
properties.value: GUI: acceptance dialog on launch. CLI: --acceptEULA switch required.

properties.name: verification-method
properties.value: SHA-256 truncated to 8 hex characters, displayed on both encode and decode for visual confirmation

properties.name: ai-assisted-development
properties.value: Claude Code (Anthropic) was used as a development tool to assist with code generation, security review, and documentation. All code was reviewed and approved by the author.
